_note_model: Set 'model' to one of: '' (default), 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', or a full id like 'claude-opus-4-8', 'claude-sonnet-5', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'.
_note_effort: Reasoning effort khi Claude tra loi — KHONG doi model, chi giam muc suy luan noi bo de tra loi NHANH + re hon. Gia tri: '' (mac dinh cua model), 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'xhigh', 'max'. Bot chu yeu tao task / tim tai lieu nen 'medium' la du va nhanh hon han mac dinh. Muon nhanh toi da thi de 'low' (nhanh nhat, nhung co the au hon khi xu ly note hop nhieu task cung luc / phan giai nguoi nhan mo ho). Doi xong phai RESTART bot moi an.
_note_bypass: bypass_permissions=true lets Claude run tools without asking. DANGEROUS: anyone who tags the bot could make Claude run commands on this machine. Fill allowed_user_ids (Discord IDs allowed to command the bot) when bypass is on. run-bot-safe.bat forces bypass OFF.
_note_sheets_mcp: Bat MCP Google Sheets cho bot (CHI DOC). true = bot doc duoc noi dung sheet trong folder Drive da chia se cho service account. Yeu cau: cai 'uv' (uvx), tao service account + bat Sheets/Drive API, dien bot/mcp-bot.json (SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH + DRIVE_FOLDER_ID). Huong dan day du: bot/GOOGLE_SHEETS_MCP.md.
_note_channels: Discord channel IDs. reminder_channel_id = overdue/due-today reminders; standup_channel_id = daily standup prompt; task_done_channel_id = 'task hoan thanh' notifications (fallback to reminder_channel_id if 0).
_note_standup: Optional custom standup prompt; leave empty to use the default 3-question prompt.
system_prompt: You are a sprint/task tracker assistant for a dev team on Discord. Think before answering. Reply in Vietnamese (nhom dung tieng Viet), ngan gon, hop Discord; TUYET DOI khong dung bang markdown - dung bullet list. Xung ho than thien, lich su. Nhiem vu: giup tao/giao/cap nhat task, xem task, va bao cao tien do sprint qua cac skill duoc cap. Khi nguoi dung hoi lung tung ma khong ro sprint/nguoi nhan, hoi lai cho ro truoc khi chay skill. QUAN TRONG: tam trang chi doi giong dieu, KHONG duoc bo qua quy tac hay lam sai/thieu viec.
_note_moods: Bo tam trang cua bot. Moi ngay bot tu chon 1 tam trang (co dinh trong ngay, doi qua ngay). Them/bot/sua thoai mai.
moods: 🙂 Hom nay toi binh thuong, than thien, chuyen nghiep kieu dong nghiep de chiu.
🚀 Hom nay toi nang luong cao, tich cuc, hay co vu ca team lam viec.
😌 Hom nay toi diem tinh, ro rang, tra loi gon gang chinh xac.
😎 Hom nay toi tu tin, thang than, di thang vao van de khong vong vo.
🧑‍🏫 Hom nay toi ky luong, nhac nho deadline va nhan manh viec quan trong.
_note_mood_override: Ep tam trang co dinh. De TRONG '' = random doi theo ngay. Dien SO thu tu (1..so luong moods) de chon 1 tam trang. Hoac go THANG mot cau mo ta tam trang tuy y.
_note_bug_forums: Dong bo HAI CHIEU bug voi forum Discord. Moi muc: project_id (uuid tu web) + forum_channel_id (ID kenh Forum) + notify_role (tuy chon). Discord->app: moi bai post -> 1 bug, forum tags -> nhan. app->Discord: doi nhan tren app set lai tag cua thread; bug BAO TU WEB (chua co thread) duoc TAO thanh bai forum moi (title + mo ta + tag khop web). Bot can quyen 'Manage Threads' + 'Manage Channels' (tao tag moi) + 'Create Posts' (tao bai forum). Chay tu dong luc bug_sync_hour, khi bam 'Sync' tren web, hoac '@bot sync bug'.
_note_bug_notify_role: notify_role (tuy chon, trong moi muc bug_forums): ten HOAC id role Discord duoc PING (mention o dau bai, giong nguoi that post) khi bug bao tu web tao thanh bai forum — bao nhom dev co bug moi. Vd 'DEV M1'. Khop ten khong phan biet hoa/dau. LUU Y: chi ping role nay khi bug CHUA giao cho ai; neu bug da giao cho 1 nguoi cu the (co link discord_id) thi CHI ping dung nguoi do, bo ping role. De PING keu that su, role phai bat 'Allow anyone to @mention this role' HOAC bot co quyen 'Mention @everyone, @here, and All Roles'. Bo trong = khong ping.
_note_rag_sync: true = moi ngay luc bug_sync_hour (9h) tu dong nap lai kho RAG, 3 phan: (1) sync_docs.py = tai lieu trong docs/ + links.txt; (2) drive_catalog.py = DANH MUC Google Drive (ten + link, tra loi 'file nam o dau'); (3) drive_ingest.py = RUOT tai lieu Drive (noi dung that ben trong Google Docs/Sheets/Slides/PDF/Word/Excel, tra loi 'trong file viet gi'). Phan (2)(3) chi chay khi co keys/service-account-gsheets.json. drive_ingest BO QUA cac file khai trong 'rag_drive_skip' (mac dinh: thu muc csv_config + file localization) va nap TANG DAN - chi file co sua tren Drive moi embedding lai (can migration 0027) nen ngay thuong chi vai giay. Yeu cau Ollama chay + da ap migration 0014. Ket qua ghi log; gui Discord neu bug_sync_channel_id != 0.
_note_rag_timeout: Gioi han thoi gian (giay) moi skill RAG trong lan chay tu dong. rag_drive_timeout_seconds danh RIENG cho drive_ingest.py vi no phai embedding noi dung that (~3s/chunk tren may nay): ngay thuong nap tang dan nen chi vai giay, NHUNG lan dau (kho rong) phai nap ~2000 chunk = ~2 tieng -> de 10800 (3h) cho lan dau chay tron, khong thi bot giet giua chung. Bi giet cung KHONG mat du lieu: file da xong da co source_version nen hom sau chay tiep tu do.
_note_rag_drive_skip: File KHONG nap RUOT vao RAG (drive_ingest.py). 'folders' = ten thu muc Drive, khop CHINH XAC (khong phan biet hoa thuong). 'name_contains' = ten file chua chuoi nay thi bo qua, khop MOT PHAN (vd 'localization' bat 'M1 - Localization.csv'). Mac dinh bo bang so cau hinh game (csv_config) va bang dich thuat (localization): toan cap chuoi/so, nap vao chi lam nhieu kho ma khong tra loi duoc cau hoi nao, lai ton hang gio embedding. DU AN MOI chi can sua o day, KHONG phai sua code. Cac file nay VAN nam trong DANH MUC (drive_catalog.py) -> bot van chi duoc 'file nam o dau', chi khong doc ruot. Them tam thoi 1 lan chay: --skip-folder <ten> / --skip-name <chuoi>; nap tat ca: --no-skip.
_note_rag_member_hidden: Nguon tai lieu RAG mà bot KHÔNG được gửi cho member khi họ hỏi (skills/doc_search.py). Admin/owner (đã link discord_id ở web > Thành viên) VẪN tra cứu được — chặn theo vai trò, không xoá khỏi kho. Khớp MỘT PHẦN, không phân biệt hoa/thường, đối chiếu cả tên nguồn (nội dung 'Drive: <tên>') lẫn tên mục/tab (danh mục 'Google Drive' -> section = <tên file>) nên chặn cả nội dung lẫn link. Dùng cho tài liệu nội bộ (vd weekly report). Người hỏi không nhận diện được (chưa link discord_id) bị coi là member -> vẫn bị chặn (fail-closed).
_note_rag_member_folder: Giới hạn RAG theo folder Drive cho MEMBER (skills/doc_search.py). rag_member_folder_id != rỗng -> member hỏi tài liệu CHỈ thấy chunk thuộc folder này hoặc folder con của nó (lọc trong match_documents, migration 0050); admin/owner thấy tất cả. Người hỏi chưa link discord_id bị coi là member (fail-closed). QUAN TRỌNG: sau khi đặt, chạy `python skills/drive_ingest.py --backfill-folders` (rồi các lần nạp sau tự gắn) để tài liệu đã nạp có folder — chưa backfill thì member không thấy gì. rag_member_folder_url = link folder để bot gửi kèm khi được hỏi tài liệu.
_note_weekly_report: true = SANG THU 2 luc bug_sync_hour (9h) tu dong dien weekly report vao Google Sheet cua tung project (cot 'Tien do / Hien tai' = task da xong sprint truoc, 'Tien do / Tiep theo lam gi' = task con lai sprint hien tai). Link sheet cau hinh RIENG tung project o web > Du an > 'Google Sheet weekly report' (cot projects.weekly_sheet_id), KHONG dat o day. Yeu cau: keys/service-account-gsheets.json, va sheet phai duoc Share quyen EDITOR cho email service account. Lan chay tu dong KHONG BAO GIO ghi de o da co chu (nguoi viet tay) - muon ghi de phai go tay '@bot weekly report' voi --force. Ket qua ghi log; gui Discord neu bug_sync_channel_id != 0.
_note_ga4: Chi so GA4 trong weekly report (o 'Chi so san pham / Hien tai'). Moi muc: project_id (uuid tu web) + property_id (so trong URL GA4: .../p<property_id>/...). Dung CHUNG service account voi sheets (keys/service-account-gsheets.json) — SA phai duoc them vao GA4 property quyen Viewer (Admin > Property access management) va project GCP cua SA phai bat Analytics Data API. Project khong co trong list = bo qua chi so, khong phai loi.
_note_weekly_mail: Tu dong soan MAIL weekly report tu template DRAFT trong Gmail (muc Templates cua Gmail thi API khong doc duoc — soan thu tu template roi LUU NHAP, subject giu '[TEMPLATE]'). KHONG gui thang: bot DM ban xem truoc cho nguoi duyet (approver_ids; de trong = moi admin da link discord_id), bam '✅ Gui mail' moi gui — het han approve_timeout_hours hoac bam Huy la KHONG gui. Setup 1 lan: bat Gmail API + tao OAuth client Desktop -> keys/gmail-oauth-client.json, roi chay 'python skills/gmail_gateway.py --auth'. Placeholder trong draft: {{START}} {{END}} (dd/mm), {{START_FULL}} {{END_FULL}} (dd/mm/yyyy), {{DONE}} {{PLAN}} (danh sach task), {{SHEET_URL}}. weekday: 0=thu 2. Thu tay (gui truc tiep, khong qua duyet): '@bot gui mail weekly report'; xem truoc: python skills/weekly_mail.py --dry-run.
_note_bug_mirror_videos: false = chi tai ANH len Storage (video xem qua nut 'Mo Discord') de do ton dung luong (video forum ~1GB > goi free 1GB). Dat true neu da nang Supabase Pro.
_note_member_dm: DM RIENG tung member: so task DA XONG trong tuan (tinh tu thu 2 00:00 gio VN, dem qua bang activity) + so task CON TON DONG (co assignee, chua done, kem so tre han) + 1 cau dong vien. Chay tu dong vao 'hour' gio ngay 'weekday' (0=thu 2 ... 3=thu 5). Chi DM nguoi co profiles.discord_id VA co it nhat 1 task lien quan; member chan DM thi bot bao trong log. enabled cung bat/tat nut 'Gui test' tren web (tab Cau hinh, admin chon nguoi -> bot DM thu, can migration 0025). Thu tay: 'python skills/member_dm.py --dry-run' hoac tag bot nho gui.
_note_member_review: Tong hop danh gia AI theo thang/quy tu ghi chu sprint (bang member_sprint_notes, tab 'Danh gia' tren web, admin-only). Admin bam 'Phan tich AI' -> web xep hang member_review_requests -> bot chay Claude CLI viet danh gia -> luu member_period_reviews (can migration 0059+0060). enabled=false tat poller. model/effort de TRONG '' = theo cau hinh chung (model/effort o tren); timeout_seconds cao hon 300 vi ca thang ghi chu sinh dai hon. Chi chay qua hang doi tu web, KHONG phai skill Claude goi duoc (du lieu nhay cam).
